chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1709 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA-14986/2016 3. For katcha peshi. 4. For hearing of MA-14987/2016 18.11.2016. Mr. Inam Ali Malik, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Saifullah Dasti, Advocate for respondents No.5 & 6. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel a/w SIP Muhammad Changal o/b of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Ghulam Mustafa o/b of SHO Cantt and SIP Syed Aamir Hussain o/b of SSP Jamshoro. = The police officials have filed their statements that there are two FIRs one in respect of Section 365-B PPC, wherein allegations have been made against the petitioner No.2 that he has abducted petitioner No.1 and another in respect of Crime No.02/2016 under Section 489-F & 420 PPC against present petitioner No.2 and others. Today, both the petitioners are present in Court. The petitioner No.1-Mst.Arshee has categorically made a statement that she wants to live with her husband, the petitioner No.2-Muhammad Shahrukh Khan and this statement today will be placed by the I.O before the concerned Court, in which concerned criminal case under Section 365-B is being tried. Today, the respondent No.5-Amanullah S/o Ghulam Hussain is also present. He undertakes that his family will not cause any harassment to the petitioners nor will extend any threat to them and he will make a sincere effort that parties may reach an amicable solution in a civilized manner. With these observations and directions, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
